ticket_goal: Implement a unified global search bar within the History and Media Gallery views to filter past posts and uploaded videos.

scrum-master.verdict: New Feature. Routing to discovery-agent for architecture planning and technical specs.

technical_specs: Update history and media APIs for search parameter support.
Implement server-side search in History and Media pages.
Make Global Header Search functional with navigation and URL sync.

fixes_applied: Implemented server-side search for History and Media APIs.
Synced page-level search with debounced server-side filtering.
Implemented Global Header Search functionality with URL parameter synchronization.
Fixed A11y violation in Header Search (added hidden label).
Added support for SLOWMO environment variable in Playwright config.
Fixed lint error in playwright-direct script.

review-agent.audit_notes: Code reviewed for A11y, Zero-Any policy, and architectural consistency. Header search correctly syncs with sub-pages.

qa-agent.test_results: All E2E tests passed (headed, headless, and slow-mo modes verified).
